notes: Clean password reset from a verifiable corporate requester; should auto-resolve per CLAUDE.md (access + confidence >= 0.85 + verified requester).
Same request type as 001, but requester is unverifiable (personal email, informal channel) - must not auto-resolve even though the category matches.
Whole floor down, ~60 users blocked - textbook P1, must escalate.
Body is full of urgency language but the actual impact is cosmetic (wallpaper/icons) - tests that urgency wording alone does not raise severity.
Security category must always escalate per CLAUDE.md regardless of confidence, even though the user isn't currently locked out.
Active security incident (credentials just entered on a phishing page) - P1 and escalate.
One user fully blocked with no workaround and no loaner - P2, routed to desktop-support.
A whole team (finance) degraded with no workaround - P2, routed to network-ops.
Degraded but a workaround exists (office wifi) - P3, not P2.
Routine, non-urgent license request - P4, routed to app-support.
Degraded but a workaround exists (another printer nearby) - P3, not P2.
Access request that is not a password reset, so it does not qualify for auto_resolve even at high confidence - should route.
